comments.author: @alishaThapaVlogs95
comments.text: Bhutan is such a beautiful country with a rich culture and warm-hearted people. 🇧🇹 I really admire your traditional dances like Cham Dance, Zhungdra, Boedra, and Atsara performances—they are so unique and beautiful. Bhutanese food such as Ema Datshi, Phaksha Paa, Jasha Maroo, Red Rice, and Momos looks absolutely delicious. I also dream of visiting amazing places like Paro Taktsang (Tiger’s Nest Monastery), Punakha Dzong, Buddha Dordenma, Dochula Pass, and Thimphu someday. Thank you for sharing such wonderful videos that showcase Bhutan’s beautiful culture, traditions, delicious food, and breathtaking places. Wishing you continued success and God’s blessings. Much love from a fan! ❤️🙏🌸

replies.author: @travellifestyletv
